description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a distinctive urban style, featuring a sleeveless vest over a fitted top and short shorts. The individual wears knee-high, horizontally striped socks paired with sturdy lace-up boots, and has a visible armband on the upper left arm. Accessories include a scarf around the neck and a pair of goggles or glasses worn on the forehead. The person has shoulder-length hair and a headband, with a confident, forward-walking posture. The overall appearance suggests a blend of casual and slightly rugged streetwear, suitable for an urban environment. The figure's attire and accessories give off a unique, possibly alternative or steampunk-inspired vibe.
description: An adult pedestrian in urban streetwear, featuring a vest, shorts, striped socks, boots, and distinctive accessories like goggles and a scarf. The figure has shoulder-length hair and a confident walking posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vest, fitted top, scarf, goggles, and forward stride.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlighting the back of the vest, headband, and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full back of the vest, shorts, and both boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armband, gloves, and the stride of the right leg.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless vest, fitted top, short shorts, knee-high striped socks, scarf, armband, gloves, goggles, headband
